cards.title: Naturopathic Assessment
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Comprehensive history: Symptom timeline, aggravating/relieving factors
  • Prakriti assessment: Vata/Pitta/Kapha constitution
  • Tongue diagnosis: Colour, coat, shape, moisture
  • Pulse diagnosis (Nadi Pariksha): Vata (serpentine), Pitta (frog), Kapha (swan)
  • Iridology basics: Constitutional eye types
